name: dhpk
description: Reusable Claude Code harness — generic core + opt-in stack modules (php-5.6, yii-1.1, phpunit-5.7). Sentinel-driven review hooks, parameterised docker/agent names, parallel Codex CLI tree.

hook_profile.title: Hook profile
hook_profile.description: Verbosity of hook output: minimal | standard | strict

review_agents.title: Review agent names
review_agents.description: Three agents invoked by sentinel reminders (code, database, security). Override to point at project-specific agents.

docker_containers.title: Docker containers
docker_containers.description: Container names checked at SessionStart. Empty list disables the check.

modules.title: Stack modules to enable
modules.description: Enable stack modules from modules/. Ships: php-5.6, yii-1.1, phpunit-5.7. Module 'requires' validated at SessionStart (warning only).

review_trigger_extra_paths.title: Extra review trigger paths
review_trigger_extra_paths.description: Extra path prefixes per reviewer slot, formatted '<slot>:<prefix>' where slot ∈ code|db|sec. Example: 'code:protected/'
